title: Back in Black
why_this_song: Back in Black by AC/DC (1980) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Well, I'm back"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Back in black"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "'Cause it's gettin' me high"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "I've been too long, I'm glad to be back"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "I hit the sack"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "well" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "well" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "black" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "black" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Back in Black" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Back in Black", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Back in Black" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Back in Black" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Back in Black", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Back in Black", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
